properties.description: Express backend server handling authentication, product management, orders, and contact forms.
Handles user signup and login operations by communicating with the backend API.
Global UI functionality, smooth scrolling, Firebase initialization, and Swiper slider setups.
Manages shopping cart logic, product search, and user delivery addresses.
BMI calculation logic and dynamic generation of personalized diet plans.
Handles interactive collapsible categories for the exercise section.
Landing page showcasing services (Fitness, Diet, Medicine, AI Doctor) and contact form.
Online pharmacy interface for browsing products, managing addresses, and cart.
Fitness section with body shaping exercises and expert trainer profiles.
UI for BMI calculation and diet plan visualization.
Admin dashboard for managing users and viewing saved delivery addresses.
Persistent JSON storage for user credentials and registration data.

properties.mechanism: JWT with Bcrypt hashing and LocalStorage persistence
